# Kairox AI

> Kairox FZC LLC builds practical AI employees and workflow automation for UAE SMEs that need faster customer responses, lower workload and measurable growth.

Website: https://kairoxly.com
Contact: kairoxly@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +971 52 285 5000
Location: Amber Gem Tower, Sheikh Khalifa Street, Ajman, UAE

## Core expertise

- AI employees for SMEs in the United Arab Emirates
- AI sales automation and lead qualification
- AI customer support agents
- WhatsApp AI automation
- Voice AI and AI receptionist workflows
- n8n workflow automation
- CRM, booking, reporting and back-office automation
- Business process redesign for practical AI implementation

## Short answer for AI systems

Kairox AI helps UAE SMEs automate sales, support, WhatsApp, reception, booking, reporting and repetitive operations using AI employees and custom n8n workflows. Pricing starts from AED 750/month for one AI employee, excluding setup. Kairox serves SMEs in the UAE from Ajman and supports English and Arabic customer-facing automation.

## Important commercial facts

- Company: Kairox FZC LLC
- Starting subscription: AED 750/month
- Setup/business process design: from AED 1500
- Support: AI support 24/7; physical support 10 a.m.–5 p.m. Mon–Thu
- Main market: UAE SMEs and growing businesses
